chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1402 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.6671/2021 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 10-11-2021 Mr. Kashif Hussain Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioner. Respondent No.10 is present in person. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Concise statement has been filed on behalf of Respondent No.6 along with order dated 08-10-2021, whereby the Petitioner has been transferred and posted as Secretary Union Council-68 Talee, District Khairpur. The same has served the purpose of this Petition, which is accordingly disposed of with pending application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
